title: can not kill the session while query with sleep
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
it comes from https://asktug.com/t/topic/1007504
<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
1. init data
```sql
create table t(a int, b int);
insert into t values (1,1); -- insert more data
select sleep(1), a.* from t a;
```
2. kill the query session
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
killed immediately 
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
1. can not kill the query immediately
2. use a lot mem and can't affected by `tidb_mem_quota_query`
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)
v6.5.2, v7.1.0
<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t2(id INT, t1_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (t1_id) REFERENCES t1(id));
SELECT t1.name, t2.id FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.t1_id WHERE t1.age IS NULL;
key_bug_features: unable to kill session during sleep query
